name: codex-usage-monitor
description: Codex Companion adds telemetry, a control center, and privacy-safe, recoverable handoffs to new tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Telemetry, control center, focus, and optimization
interface.longDescription: Extends Codex with session-isolated telemetry, a command palette, advisory budgets, project insights, smart performance scheduling, Safe Handoff Builder, native history focus, local token-saving advice, privacy-safe history, alerts, and verified message footers.
